reasoning: We're addressing your lactate clearance limiter by focusing on sustained power efforts with strategic over-unders. Your recent ride shows a need for better aerobic base and fatigue resistance, key to attacking the main climb of the Alpine Loop effectively.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 mins at 201-218W, 3 mins at 242-256W, repeat 5x. Focus on maintaining good form and controlled breathing.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to flush out the legs

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
